overview: KingRank1 is a modern PDF education library for competitive exam preparation. Browse 8 categories of study materials — from SSC and Railway to NCERT Books — with chapter-wise PDFs you can view, download, search, and bookmark.
features: 8-room home grid with colorful gradient cards for SSC, Railway, Civil Services, Banking, Defence, Current Affairs, NCERT, and Other Books
Chapter-wise PDF browsing with View and Download buttons per PDF
Search PDFs across all categories instantly
Bookmark favorite PDFs and track recently viewed materials
Download progress indicator for each PDF
Dark mode UI with smooth animations
Banner, Interstitial, and Rewarded ad slots with placeholder IDs ready to swap
